title: angiopteris palmiformis
intro: Angiopteris palmiformis, also known as the 'Queen Fern', is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia and Australia, characterized by its large, palm-like fronds and distinctive growth habit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Angiopteris palmiformis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the Queen Fern are often used in traditional medicine, typically in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications.
